title: The Scholar's Gambit
description: A partial encyclopedia article lists three ingredients on the same aspect. Use the supporting clues to identify the fourth.

hints.text: The article on the B aspect has three known entries: ingredients [1, 2, 3] all have B+. There are exactly 4 alchemicals with B+. The fourth must be one of: [4, 5, 6, 7, 8]. Use the other clues to eliminate candidates.

Eliminate candidates:
  — ingredient 4: eliminated (eliminated by constraints)
  — ingredient 5: eliminated (eliminated by constraints)
  — ingredient 6: eliminated (eliminated by constraints)
  — ingredient 7: eliminated (book clue: lunar)
  — ingredient 8: survives
Only ingredient 8 remains. It is alchemical PPP, which has B+. It is the missing fourth entry.
